ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size category */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label for the size (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "chest_measurement" TEXT /* Measurement of the chest in centimeters */,
  "waist_measurement" TEXT /* Measurement of the waist in centimeters */,
  "pelvis_measurement" TEXT /* Measurement of the pelvis in centimeters */,
  "neck_measurement" TEXT /* Measurement of the neck in centimeters */,
  "size_range" TEXT /* Range of sizes (e.g., XS-S, M-L) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the size is intended */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand for which the size measurements are specific */,
  "sleeve_length_measurement" TEXT /* Measurement of the sleeve length in centimeters */,
  "shoulder_width_measurement" TEXT /* Measurement of the shoulder width in centimeters */,
  "inseam_measurement" TEXT /* Measurement of the inseam length in centimeters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "apparel_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each apparel item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "item_category" TEXT /* Category of the clothing item (e.g., shirt, pants) */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size associated with the item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the clothing item */,
  "inventory_count" INTEGER /* Count of items available in inventory */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the apparel item */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the apparel item */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the apparel item */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the item is suitable */,
  "is_featured" TEXT /* Flag indicating if the item is featured */,
  "return_rate" REAL /* Rate of returns for this item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apparel_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "preferred_size_id" INTEGER /* Preferred size ID of the customer */,
  "preferred_brand" TEXT /* Preferred brand of the customer */,
  "preferred_category" TEXT /* Preferred category of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_preferred_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount for the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order the item belongs to */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the apparel item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item ordered */,
  "price_at_purchase" REAL /* Price of the item at the time of purchase */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "is_returned" TEXT /* Flag indicating if the item was returned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES apparel_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for feedback entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer providing feedback */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size being reviewed */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Textual feedback from the customer */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer for the fit (1-5) */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the apparel item for which the feedback is provided */,
  "fit_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of how the item fits */,
  "fit_accuracy" INTEGER /* Rating of how accurately the size fits (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_feedback_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES apparel_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_feedback_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee belongs to */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "is_admin" TEXT /* Flag indicating if the employee has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order item being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the item was returned */,
  "reason_for_return" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the return */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_item_id") REFERENCES order_items ("order_item_id")
)
